query:
ALTER TABLE regulation_sources
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN syncStatus ENUM('ok','error','pending','never') DEFAULT 'never',
  ADD COLUMN version VARCHAR(128) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN lastSyncError TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL;

ALTER TABLE search_queries
  ADD COLUMN project_id INT NULL DEFAULT NULL;
